title: BR-001 Full Root + Verify Deep — Versuch / Abnahme-Status

phase2_package_freeze.reason: sudo -n systemctl stop requires password in this non-interactive session

phase4_blocker.detail: POST /api/backup/create runs as User=setuphelfer. Mount /media/gabriel/Backup is mode 0700 owner gabriel:gabriel — setuphelfer cannot traverse or write. Default configured backup_dir /mnt/setuphelfer/backups is on internal nvme (/) — rejected for this STRICT run (externes Medium required).
phase4_blocker.note_readonly_exclusion: unattended-upgrade-shutdown excluded from package_activity blocking per package_activity.py

phase5_verify_deep.reason: No completed full-root archive on allowed external path

phase6_timer_restore.note: Timers were not stopped in this session; no restart required

operator_next_steps: Either chmod/ACL on external backup root so setuphelfer can write (e.g. group setuphelfer + g+rwX, or dedicated subdirectory owned by setuphelfer:setuphelfer), or mount USB under /mnt/setuphelfer/... per product conventions with correct ownership.
Stop apt-related timers with pkexec/sudo during maintenance window, then start full backup with backup_dir pointing at writable external path and confirm_full_expert + async as required.
After success: POST /api/backup/verify with mode=deep on final .tar.gz path.
